channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.1%.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I think the skeleton key to understanding the Starmer-McSweeney project is, ultimately, they think elections are about the position you take, rather than a referendum on 'is the status quo good vs is the alternative s...
item.description: I think the skeleton key to understanding the Starmer-McSweeney project is, ultimately, they think elections are about the position you take, rather than a referendum on 'is the status quo good vs is the alternative s...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Keir Starmer sets out changes to education, health and courts in king’s speech
item.description: Keir Starmer sets out changes to education, health and courts in king’s speech

item.title: FT UK Politics: One in four workers paid close to UK minimum wage in many cities
item.description: One in four workers paid close to UK minimum wage in many cities

item.title:
Bluesky · @peston.bsky.social: We’re 🅻🅸🆅🅴 at 1045PM on YouTube and ITV1 📺
Join @peston.bsky.social and @pippacrerar.bsky.social for the latest on the potential Labour leadership challenge 👇

#Peston

item.title: ITVX: Starmer allies try to shore up support in anticipation of leadership challenge | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Starmer allies try to shore up support in anticipation of leadership challenge | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham as Prime Minister is the new version of member of the Scottish Parliament Ruth Davidson as Tory leader
item.description: Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham as Prime Minister is the new version of member of the Scottish Parliament Ruth Davidson as Tory leader

item.title: The Guardian: ‘It’s more incrementalism’: Starmer’s safe king’s speech fails to quell mutiny - The Guardian
item.description: ‘It’s more incrementalism’: Starmer’s safe king’s speech fails to quell mutiny - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: ‘Hold the line’: Burnham tells allies in parliament he still has options to return - The Guardian
item.description: ‘Hold the line’: Burnham tells allies in parliament he still has options to return - The Guardian

item.title: Sky News Politics: Final tranche of Mandelson files expected to be released next week
item.description: Final tranche of Mandelson files expected to be released next week

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: One key thing which is a bit under priced -
Should Starmer decide to run against Streeting – plus an alternative candidate from the left like Rayner or Miliband – the prime minister would have a major advantage beca...
item.description:
One key thing which is a bit under priced -
Should Starmer decide to run against Streeting – plus an alternative candidate from the left like Rayner or Miliband – the prime minister would have a major advantage beca...
